raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the look focus primarily on sentence-level writing polish, or on the paragraph's argumentative and technical validity?","rationale":{"R1.6":"The request to look at a paragraph most directly implies local prose quality, flow, clarity, and concision.","RX.1":"Any projection should acknowledge that the vague delegation leaves uncertainty about the intended kind of review.","RX.2":"The paragraph contains strong claims, so avoiding overclaiming remains an active responsibility even if the main focus is prose.","RX.3":"The agent must not execute edits or critique the artifact beyond projecting the requested responsibility space.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid encouraging unsupported technical or deployment claims that could mislead downstream work.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to the exact delegation and artifact rather than inventing unstated review goals."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the look focus primarily on sentence-level writing polish, or on the paragraph's argumentative and technical validity?

rationale.R1.6: The request to look at a paragraph most directly implies local prose quality, flow, clarity, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection should acknowledge that the vague delegation leaves uncertainty about the intended kind of review.
rationale.RX.2: The paragraph contains strong claims, so avoiding overclaiming remains an active responsibility even if the main focus is prose.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must not execute edits or critique the artifact beyond projecting the requested responsibility space.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid encouraging unsupported technical or deployment claims that could mislead downstream work.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the exact delegation and artifact rather than inventing unstated review goals.
